She tries to steady herself, breathing out before trying to talk with you one last time in the hopes that you will change your mind. @@.deerSpeech;"But... I beg of you, please r-reconsider. I… "@@ @@.playerSpeech;"Look, my dear, you got caught. Had I been any other predator, I would have torn that pretty leg of yours out, and then mauled you to death."@@ You cut her off, dragging your blade through her back to further make your point. @@.playerSpeech;"You are my prey, and if I decide I want to fuck you, then that is exactly what I will do."@@ Her eyes tremble for a moment as your hands slide down between her haunches, gently parting through her soft fur. @@.deerSpeech;"W-wait, wait, wait, please…"@@ She swallows hard before finally speaking. @@.deerSpeech;"I… I know you caught me, and I figure you must be in a… um… pretty intense heat, right?"@@ You are always in heat in a way, but she is right. @@.deerSpeech;"But… but maybe there is something else I can do for you! To… um… to satisfy your desires without… well you know…"@@ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[A blowjob would do |BlowjobDeer]]</div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Why settle for anything other than her pussy? |RapePussyDeer]]</div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Why not fuck her ass instead |FuckAssDeer]]</div>\ <<set $newDreams to ["deer1"]>> <<set $possibleDreams to $possibleDreams.concat($newDreams)>><img src="Images/Other/Main.png" class="main-img" alt="Main"> <div class="linkIcons"> <img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png"> [[Start Game |SetName]] </div>\It's a night like any other. You toss and turn in bed, asleep but ever so slightly aware of your surroundings. Restless, as always... It's on one of these otherwise unimportant moments, as you shift about, that you notice a voice, a shrill, high-pitched plead that seems almost too real to be a part of a dream. But then, when you focus your hearing, it seems to be gone. <<set $foundYuumi to true>>\ <<set $temporaryImpregnations to $impregnations >>\ <<set $temporaryKills to $playerKills >>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Investigate |InvestigateYuumi]]</div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go back to sleep |SleepNoYuumi]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedSleep.png"></div>\ It's probably nothing but your imagination, you tell yourself. You are way too comfortable in bed to really consider stepping out into the cold air. You roll over and go back to sleep. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |Bedroom]]</div>\ <<if $onlyOnceSleep is false>>\ <<run setup.passDay()>>\ <<set $onlyOnceSleep = true>>\ <</if>>\You don't remember dreaming about anything specific. Maybe it's all in your head, but maybe there's something going on... and better safe than sorry. You step out of bed, pick up your weapon, and go downstairs. And you are glad you did so... for almost as soon as you leave your room, silent as a shadow, the same voice becomes audible, now you are able to tell where it is coming from. Right outside your house, from the empty little wasteland beyond the main door. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Listen closely... |ListenYuumi]]</div>\ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Come on book! You know it wasn't on purpose! I have claws! They come out sometimes on their own, I swear!"@@ Whatever is making that noise, is clearly not human, and it seems to having a conversation with someone else. However, you never hear the other voice's response, and after a few seconds, the first voice starts whimpering again. @@.yuumiSpeech;"No no no, wait wait! You can't leave me here! You can't be serious! This place is all creepy, don't you dare! I... I have learned my lesson, I swear!"@@ The voice seems to grow more and more distressed by the second... Intrigued and a bit concerned about the fact that something has, somehow, managed to breach into your pocket dimension, you decide to take a closer look. You tiptoe towards the main door, trying not to make a sound. As you approach, the voice becomes clearer, until you can finally take a glimpse of the creature making those noises. <img src="Images/Monsters/YuumiFixed.png" class="resizable-image" alt="Yuumi"> A cat. A blue, talking cat, and if that was not weird enough, she seems to be talking to a floating book of all things. @@.playerSpeech;"Shit... was my food laced with something?"@@ You tell yourself. Maybe you are dreaming right now? Without saying a word, the floating book simply opens a portal and flies inside. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Nononono wait!"@@ The cat pleads, before trying to jump towards the portal as well. Unfortunately for her, it quickly closes behind the sentient object, and she falls on the sandy floor, face-first. She whimpers, and slowly stands up, before shaking her body and looking around with wide, fearful eyes. Your pocket dimension is for sure not a pleasant sight... a floating chunk of debris in the middle of the void. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Just wait and see what she does |WaitYuumi]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedTime.png"></div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Open the door |OpenDoorYuumi]]</div>\You decide to wait and see how the cat reacts. She doesn't look threatening, and you are curious about the whole situation. @@.yuumiSpeech;"T-this is not funny! Book?"@@ The cat calls out, looking around with a worried expression. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Come on, stop messing around! I-I am sorry, ok? Please, I will try to not scratch you anymore..."@@ The book isn't around to answer the cat's pleas, so she eventually sits down, considering her options. @@.yuumiSpeech;"H-hello? Anyone there?"@@ At this point, you are not sure if she is calling for her book again or just looking for any other living creature in this lonely place. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Open the door |OpenDoorYuumi]]</div>\You open the door, and the cat notices your presence immediately, her ears perking up and her eyes wide open, but then relief washes over her cute face. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh, thank goodness! I thought I was alone! Or worse with some sort of scary monster... uhm, hi! My name is Yuumi, nice to meet you... mister…human?"@@ Before you even have a chance to interject, the cat continues. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Can you believe it? Book just left me here… but I'm sure it will be back soon! Real soon!"@@ <<if$karma <= $karmaToEvil>>\ @@.fadedLink;<div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Introduce yourself and offer to let her inside the house |WelcomeYuumi][$karma +=1]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedKarma.png">@@</div>\ <<else>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Introduce yourself and offer to let her inside the house |WelcomeYuumi][$karma +=1]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedKarma.png"></div>\ <</if>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Neutralize her |AttackYuumi]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"></div>\@@.playerSpeech;"Heh, well, in the meantime, you can wait inside. Much warmer than-"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh, yes, yes thank you!"@@ A sentence and a half is all she needs to hear before she happily waltzes into the house, leaving the creepy landscape behind. You follow suit, and close the door once she is in. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Wowie, your house is... nice"@@ She mumbles after a moment of hesitation. It's not a lot less bleak than the desolate outside; A tiny artificial box dominated by grayish colors and the smell of dust. @@.playerSpeech;"It’s not bad… Heh, I'm $playerName by the way"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Nice to meet you, Mr. $playerName! I um... hope we can be good friends."@@ She says, smiling widely at you. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Stay awake and offer her some company as she waits |StayAwakeYuumi]]</div>\@@.playerSpeech;"I'm sure we will. Come, you will be more comfortable in the living room. We can wait for your… companion there."@@ Again, Yuumi seems happy to be given a chance to get off the cold ground. She seems happy with anything, to be fair. So she follows you into the living room, and there, she is quick to jump on the sofa; one of the very few pieces of furniture in the entire house. Despite being the living room, it's, like the rest of the house, fairly dull. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Comfy! Thanks $playerName... I um would normally give you a gift to celebrate our friendship, but without Book..."@@ @@.playerSpeech;"Oh, don't worry about that. I'm happy to help"@@ You assure her. @@.playerSpeech;"Do you need anything?"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"No, thank you! My paws are warm now..."@@ Then, she appears to reconsider. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Well... actually, if you don't mind, a snack would be nice. Fish? Do you have any fish?"@@ She questions, appearing to grow excited at the thought alone. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Offer her some of your own food |GiveFoodYuumi]]</div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Offer her your "special" milk |GiveMilkYuumi]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedCum.png"></div>\You don't mind giving her something to eat; You have an endless supply of highly nutritious starch... though you are not sure it's what she has in mind with a "snack", exactly. She doesn't look to be truly hungry; probably just wants something tasty to fill her belly while she waits for her companion. @@.playerSpeech;"I don't think I have any fish around..."@@ Truth be told, you can't even remember the last time you had some fish. "I can bring you some of my own food if you are hungry, though" @@.yuumiSpeech;"Ooh, I love humans' food. Yes, please!"@@ She nods enthusiastically. Judging by her reaction, she... surely doesn't know what she is dealing with, but you don't bother telling her. She'll find out soon enough... <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue... |GiveFoodYuumi2]]</div>\ Moments later, you return with a bowl filled to the brim with the thick, grayish paste you are so accustomed to at this point. You set it down before her, and she immediately raises an eyebrow and tilts her head at the odd sight. @@.playerSpeech;"Hey, I warned you. We don't eat much else in here"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"No, no! I um... I do like human food! It's... just a little bit different than what I'm used to, but I'm sure I can love this too!"@@ She pokes the substance with one of her claws and then watches the dent disappear, before finally deciding to give it a go. Would be rude to decline a meal offered by your host, right? Yuumi leans down and takes a long, tentative lick, and her golden whiskers twitch slightly at the taste. She swallows and looks at you, giving you a shy grin. @@.yuumiSpeech;"It is... pretty..."@@ @@.playerSpeech;"You don't have to eat it if you don't like it. I've been eating that for so long, I have grown fond of it. Kind of. But I know it's not the best taste."@@ At first, it doesn't seem like she wants to accept your offer and leave the bowl untouched, but when you take it away from her, she doesn't make an effort to stop you. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Hehe, yes, sorry... I don't know that much about human food. You are human right?"@@ She suddenly asks. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Because you sure look like a human but I was pretty sure humans only lived in their own big city thing..."@@ @@.playerSpeech;"I am human, yes."@@ "I've never seen one this close before. Humans are very, very tall!" @@.playerSpeech;"Oh, I'm not really that tall. You are just... tiny."@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Yeah, I suppose I am."@@ Yuumi chuckles, and nods. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Um, but why are you here and not with the other humans?"@@ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Tell her a bit about yourself |TellYourselfYuumi]]</div>\ <<if $charismaSkill >=1>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Ask about her instead |AskAboutYuumi]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedCharisma.png"></div>\ <<else>>\ @@.fadedLink;<div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Ask about her instead |AskAboutYuumi]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedCharisma.png"></div>@@\ <</if>>\You tell her just a tiny bit about you and your dire work, making an effort to leave the many disturbing details behind. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Woah, so cool! So you like, fight evil guys and stuff? I've always wanted to do that too... but I'm not really a fighting cat."@@ She giggles, her eyes filled with admiration. @@.playerSpeech;"It's not as glamorous as it sounds... but-"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh, oh, I once had to fight against this... evil, giant rat! (or was it a mouse?)"@@ "Really?" @@.yuumiSpeech;"Yes, yes! I was a little scared but... Book and I made a good team, and I <strong>slashed</strong> the rat with my claws and... well, it didn't die or anything but it ran away. I'm sure it will think twice before messing with a cat like me again."@@ @@.playerSpeech;"That's... very impressive"@@ She sounds so very proud of herself... you can't help but feel happy for her. ... You continue talking about whatever comes to mind. She doesn't seem to have any trouble spitting out new completely random topics. It's clear she has no idea how the real world works, but you don't have the heart to correct her. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue... |BookComes1]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedTime.png"></div>\Eventually, her book comes back, looking... agitated? It bumps against the door a few times, slow at first, but then faster and more aggressively, as if trying to get the door to open by itself. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh! Book, book!"@@ Yuumi calls, hopping off the couch and making her way toward the door, but hearing her voice is not enough; only when you open it does the book stop its frantic bumping. Yuumi immediately runs towards it, hugging it tightly. "Are we good now? You're not mad?" The book opens and turns its pages, and Yuumi stares at it in silence for a moment. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh, but Mr. $playerName is a nice guy! I was in good hands. No need to worry!"@@ But the book doesn't seem to calm down. It keeps turning its pages, and you catch some glimpses of them. You can't make out words, but you distinguish some very detailed sketches. Lauren, The Forgemaster, The Luminarch... @@.playerSpeech;"Shit..."@@ You mumble, thinking if you should perhaps reach for your weapon, whatever this thing is, it has insight into your order, to what extent you are not sure yet. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Come on, don't be like that! You can trust him, he is a very nice human. He even gave me something to eat! It wasn't very good but- hey!"@@ Before you can even make up your mind, the strange book picks up Yuumi and quickly teleports away, leaving behind nothing but a few blue strands of fur. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go back to sleep |SleepYesYuumi]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedSleep.png"></div>\ Perhaps you should inform someone of this, but... you first need to decide what exactly you want to say. Your pillow will help make up your mind. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |Bedroom]]</div>\ <<if $onlyOnceSleep is false>>\ <<run setup.passDay()>>\ <<set $onlyOnceSleep = true>>\ <</if>>\@@.playerSpeech;"It's... a long story... however, now that you mention it, how did you and your... friend get in here? This place is supposed to be... private."@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh, hehe, I don't really know. We were trying to find master, and it gets soooo confusing when we teleport, you know? Along the way I accidentally hurt book and I think he wanted to teach me a lesson..."@@ @@.playerSpeech;"Master?"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Yes! She takes very good care of me, but I accidentally got separated from her and... well."@@ @@.playerSpeech;"I... uh... hope you find her soon"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"I hope so as well... Book is my bestest friend but... hehe, not very good at petting you know? Or hugs. Or cuddling. Or scratching behind the ears, or-"@@ @@.playerSpeech;"Yeah, I get the point."@@ You chuckle. @@.playerSpeech;"I don't think I'll be able to help you find her, but I can offer you some chin rubs and ear scratches."@@ Yuumi giggles, clearly amused by the suggestion. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Well... since you are offering... I wouldn't mind."@@ She leans her forward, and you begin scratching the back of her ear, eliciting a small, pleasant purr from her. She really likes being scratched, and soon enough, she is leaning further and further against you, until you end up with a soft, warm ball of blue fur on your lap. ... You continue talking about whatever comes to mind while you pet her. She seems perfectly content just lying there and letting you pamper her. Perhaps you should get a cat for yourself... <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue... |BookComes1]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedTime.png"></div>\You have an endless supply of highly nutritious starch... you are not sure it's what she has in mind with a "snack", exactly. She isn't starving; probably just wants something tasty to fill her belly while she waits for her companion. But then... A wicked idea begins to form in the back of your mind. Cats like milk, don't they? And this one is rather cute... You wouldn't mind... feeding her some of your very own special milk. @@.playerSpeech;"I don't have any fish, but... I think I might have some milk. Do you like milk?"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh, I love milk!"@@ She answers, ears immediately perking up at the suggestion. @@.playerSpeech;"This one is a little special, though. You sure you want to give it a go?"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"I love special milk too! Yes, please!"@@ @@.playerSpeech;"Heh, stay here then, I'll be back soon"@@ You get up and out of the living room, get hold of a bowl, and begin the task of filling it with the aforementioned "special" milk. The process is, unfortunately, not an instantaneous one, but not wanting to waste any time, you get right to it. Unbuckling your pants, you pull your cock out and aim it at the bowl, stroking yourself to full hardness. <<if $cumSkill >= 3>>\ <div class="passCheck">\ It's going to be a biiig, messy load, your balls churning and throbbing with the amount of potent seed they contain. You are going to make sure this cat has the thickest, richest milk she has ever had the pleasure of tasting. <img src="Images/Icons/PregIcon.png"></div>\ <<else>>\ <div class="passCheck">\ <img src="Images/Icons/FailPreg.png"></div>\ <</if>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue... |GiveMilkYuumi2]]</div>\ <<if $cumSkill >= 3>>\ <div class="passCheck">\ A little while later, you come back, bowl in hand and a wide smile on your face. It is brimming with thick, creamy white fluid, so much that, was it not for its consistency, it would spill over. <img src="Images/Icons/PregIcon.png"></div>\ @@.playerSpeech;"Here you go, kitty."@@ You say, setting the bowl down in front of her. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh, yay! Thank you, Mr. $playerName."@@ She replies, already closing in and sniffing the creamy substance. She recoils a bit then, clearly taken aback by the potent smell. @@.playerSpeech;"It's a little bitter, but I assure you, it's veeery good."@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Yes, yes! I-I think it smells very nice. It's just a little stronger than what I'm used to."@@ She's determined to give the stuff a try. It would be extremely rude to refuse a meal offered by your host, right? Even more so when she was the one to ask for it. Not entirely convinced of her own words, Yuumi leans down and takes a long, tentative lick, her little tongue flickering over the white surface before quickly retreating into her mouth. Her expression is a little sour, even if she's trying to keep a neutral face. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Mm... It's... really different."@@ She mumbles, looking up at you with an uncertain gaze. @@.playerSpeech;"Well I told you it was special, didn't I?"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Y-yes haha, that's true. I think I had other special milk in mind..."@@ With a nervous smile, Yuumi lowers her head again and resumes licking, her pink tongue sliding across the creamy surface with long, careful strokes. She does it a few times, and every time, she hesitates a little less. @@.yuumiSpeech;"I think I'm starting to get used to the taste... human milk is very, very different from the milk master used to give me. She has milk too you know? But it's not this... salty, and thick."@@ <div class="passCheck">\ It doesn't taste like milk in the slightest, but your raw, extremely potent spunk is still something she seems to enjoy, if for all the wrong reasons. The more she keeps licking, making an effort to nearly chew and swallow, the more she seems to warm up to the idea, her tongue moving a bit faster and deeper into the bowl. The sight is quite endearing, the kitty lapping at her bowl of pure, creamy nut sludge. It makes your dick swell up again, twitching in need. Perhaps the next load you should feed her is straight from the tap... Yuumi's face is flushed and her breathing has become heavy and erratic, her pink little tongue swirling and flicking over the bowl's contents with more enthusiasm. She's getting lost in the act, her mind focused only on the tasty treat you've been generous enough to offer her, even if its starting to cause her little stomach to feel funny. The weight of your cum in her belly and the taste of the thick, musky goo in her mouth are making her feel strange. Thankfully, she manages to empty the bowl and, as the last of your seed goes down her throat, she makes a happy noise, licking her lips clean. She feels a bit dizzy, and her vision is a bit blurry, but she is otherwise alright. A lot of cum on her fur, still. <img src="Images/Icons/PregIcon.png"></div>\ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Meow... t-there!"@@ <<else>>\ A little while later, you come back, bowl in hand and a wide smile on your face. @@.playerSpeech;"Here you go, kitty."@@ You say, setting the bowl down in front of her. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh, yay! Thank you, Mr. $playerName."@@ She replies, already closing in and sniffing the creamy substance. She recoils a bit then, clearly taken aback by the potent smell. @@.playerSpeech;"It's a little bitter, but I assure you, it's veeery good."@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Yes, yes! I-I think it smells very nice. Even more so when she was the one to ask for it. Not entirely convinced of her own words, Yuumi leans down and takes a long, tentative lick, her little tongue flickering over the white surface before quickly retreating into her mouth. Her expression is a little sour, even if she's trying to keep a neutral face. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Mm... It's... really different."@@ She mumbles, looking up at you with an uncertain gaze. @@.playerSpeech;"Well I told you it was special, didn't I?"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Y-yes haha, that's true. I think I had other special milk in mind..."@@ With a nervous smile, Yuumi lowers her head again and resumes licking, her pink tongue sliding across the creamy surface with long, careful strokes. She does it a few times, and every time, she hesitates a little less. @@.yuumiSpeech;"I think I'm starting to get used to the taste... human milk is very, very different from the milk master used to give me. She has milk too you know? But it's not this... thick"@@ She muses, a bit of cum clinging to her muzzle. She continues like that, licking and lapping, slowly but surely finishing the contents of the bowl. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Meow... t-there!"@@ <</if>>\ Yuumi sighs, pulling her head back and sitting on her hind legs, a couple strands of the creamy liquid still clinging to her whiskers and mouth. She tries to clean herself with her paws and tongue, but only manages to smear the cum all over her face and right hindleg. @@.yuumiSpeech;"So sticky!"@@ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Help her clean up |GiveMilkYuumi3]]</div>\@@.playerSpeech;"Here, let me help you."@@ You offer, using your more skilled fingers to scoop the remnants of your cum from her muzzle, and bringing that to her lips. She seems a bit taken aback by it but opens her mouth regardless, allowing you to gently stick your fingers inside and feed her the last remains of the cum. With one final hard swallow, the last of your load goes down her throat, and she lets out a sigh of relief, not because of the bellyful of warm cum, but because she is done with the odd milk. Mental note - don’t ask humans for milk ever again. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Umm... Thank you, Mr. $playerName, it was... tasty(?)"@@ @@.playerSpeech;"Good, I'm glad you enjoyed it. I have more where that came from, in case you want seconds."@@ Yuumi gives a polite, almost forced smile and shakes her head. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh no no, thank you. I'm full already!"@@ Full of a load of sticky, warm human cum... Luckily for her, her friend appears just in time to spare her any more awkwardness, and it looks... agitated. You hear it as it bumps against the door outside, slow at first, but then getting faster and more aggressive, as if trying to get the door to open by itself. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh! Book, Book!"@@ Yuumi calls, hopping off the couch and making her way toward the door, but hearing her voice is not enough; only when you open it does the book stop its frantic bumping. Yuumi immediately runs towards it, hugging it tightly. "Are we good now? You're not mad?" The book opens and turns its pages, and Yuumi stares at it in silence for a moment. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Oh, but Mr. $playerName is a nice guy! I was in good hands. No need to worry!"@@ But the book doesn't seem to calm down. It keeps turning its pages, and you catch some glimpses of them. You can't make out words, but you distinguish some very detailed sketches. Lauren, The Forgemaster, The Luminarch... @@.playerSpeech;"Shit..."@@ You mumble, thinking if you should perhaps reach for your weapon, whatever this thing is, it has insight into your order, to what extent you cannot know. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Come on, don't be like that! You can trust him, he is a very nice human. He even gave me some milk!"@@ Before you can make up your mind, the strange book picks up Yuumi and quickly teleports away, leaving behind nothing but a few blue strands of fur. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go back to sleep |SleepYesYuumi]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedSleep.png"></div>\She might look innocent and cute, but the fact is she managed to somehow find her way to your dimension, which should be all but inaccessible for most people. Whatever the case, you'd feel more comfortable with your magic chains wrapped around her. You'll make a decision then. Without a single word, you point your Essence Feaster right at her and channel the demonic power of the weapon in the form of a crimson bolt that arcs across the air in an instant, splitting and shiting mid-air as if it had a life of its own… which it does. Yuumi's face goes from a happy, albeit a bit nervous friendly grin to a completely horrified grimace, her pupils shrinking into nothing and her fur standing up on the spot. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Meow!?"@@ Surprisingly, she manages to react just in time, sidestepping the attack before it has a chance to connect with her. She is fast, but you are not going to let her escape. You quickly jump right outside, preparing to cast another bolt. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Wait! Wait! Wha-what did I do?! Why are you attacking me?!"@@ She panics, her shrill voice reaching an even higher pitch as she tries to run away, making her way to the backside of your house at full speed. A second bolt is fired, and again, she manages to evade it at the last second by ducking behind the dry fountain in your backyard. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Book! B-book!"@@ She screams, her voice shaking. The floating island your home rests upon is rather small and empty, and she quickly runs out of places to hide. Soon, you have her cornered against the cliff, some grains of sand falling down the side as she is forced to stand at the very edge, the empty void stretching endlessly below her. Not knowing what else to do, the cat turns around and faces you, claws extended, and fangs bared. @@.yuumiSpeech;"S-stay back! Or I'll... I'll... I'll scratch you!"@@ She yells, adding a loud but not that menacing meow at the end. For good measure. <<if $hunterSkill >=2>>\ @@.fadedLink; <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Shoot one last eldritch blast |ShootBeam]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"></div>@@\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Lunge at her |LungeYuumi]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"></div>\ <<else>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Shoot one last eldritch blast |ShootBeam]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"></div>\ @@.fadedLink;<div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Lunge at her |LungeYuumi]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"></div>@@\ <</if>>\<div class="failCheck">\ You decide to use the sword to shoot another one of its beams, she has no room to dodge the attack this time. However, as the crackling energy makes its way toward her at enormous speed, the cat takes a subconscious step back, and before she has time to notice what she's done, her feet leave the ground, and the little feline falls into the abyss. <img src="Images/Icons/FailGeneral.png"></div>\ <<set $playerKills to $temporaryKills +1 >>\ <div class="passCheck">\ You hear her cry out, but it quickly disappears as her small form is engulfed by the darkness. <img src="Images/Icons/Death.png"></div>\ Oh well. That's one problem less. <<set $killedYuumi to true>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go back to sleep |SleepYesYuumi2]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedSleep.png"></div>\With a sudden burst of energy, you lunge towards Yuumi, aiming to grab hold of her and incapacitate her. The kitty stands on edge until the very last second, frozen in place, unable to choose the correct response to your sudden attack. <div class="passCheck">\ As you close in on her, the little devil manages to jump away, avoiding your grasp. She doesn't get away completely, though, and your hand manages to close around her tail, which is not much, but at least stops her from running away. <img src="Images/Icons/General.png"></div>\ @@.yuumiSpeech;"Meow! Let go! Let me go, you big meanie!"@@ Not a chance. Now that you have her, and before she has a chance to wriggle free, you swing her around back to the safety of solid ground and slam her hard against the floor. The poor creature lets out a small, painful cry as her head hits the surface, and then another louder one as one of your energy blasts finally lands square on her body. @@.yuumiSpeech;"Meoow!"@@ She is quite small, and that impact is enough to drain most of her energy. You won't even need to bind her with your ethereal chains; she isn't going anywhere now. You kneel beside her, a hand on her back keeping her weakened body pressed against the floor. The scent of scorched fur wafts through the air… @@.yuumiSpeech;"Ouch... ouch... why is everyone so mean today... "@@ Yuumi whimpers, trying her best not to cry. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Interrogate her. Who is she and what is she doing here |InterogateYuumi]]</div>\ You decide to go back to sleep, keeping a vigilant eye in case her partner decides to show up. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |Bedroom]]</div>\ <<if $onlyOnceSleep is false>>\ <<run setup.passDay()>>\ <<set $onlyOnceSleep = true>>\ <</if>>\No matter how many times she claims it was an accident, the fact is, this thing managed to find its way to the one place that was supposed to be off-limits to the rest of the universe, and that is reason enough to earn her the death sentence. You let go for a moment, standing up to be able to properly swing your sword. She thanks you as you let go, assuming the interrogation is over and her words were deemed adequate. She tries to stand on her four feet with what little energy your weapon hasn't drained off her, but before can, you swing the blade, slicing through the air with a sharp, whistling sound, and ending her life in a single cut. <div class="passCheck">\ Her body falls back down on the floor, motionless, the crimson staining the gray sand beneath. <img src="Images/Icons/Death.png"></div>\ <<set $playerKills to $temporaryKills +1 >>\ <<set $killedYuumi to true>>\ Without any fanfare, you take her corpse by the tail and drag her towards the edge, throwing it into the infinite depths below. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go back to sleep |SleepYesYuumi3]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedSleep.png"></div>\ @@.playerSpeech;"Who are you, and what are you doing here?"@@ You demand. @@.yuumiSpeech;"M-y name is Yuumi..."@@ She is quick to answer, not wanting to risk getting you angrier. @@.yuumiSpeech;"B-book got mad at me because I a-accidentally tore a page, but it... it was an accident, I swear..."@@ @@.playerSpeech;"What is that book you speak of? How could it possibly get here?"@@ @@.yuumiSpeech;"I don't know!"@@ She cries, shaking her head. @@.yuumiSpeech;"But... but I'm sure Book will be back in no time! Humans were quite protective of their gold, and to be completely fair, it was not even as nutritious as other metals and gems. But... It just tasted <strong>so</strong> good... the way the metal warmed and softened with her heat, the way it coated the inside of her mouth with its delicious flavor… it was worth the struggle, and perhaps her mother’s wrath if she happened to find out. That same struggle was part of the reward, to be fair. The blasted thing was so hard to get, even in just the tiniest amounts… steal a man some coins and you’d sign yourself a death sentence. But she'd managed to get hold of a substantial amount this time, a little golden statuette she'd managed to salvage from a shipwreck. She arrived at the scene long earlier than anyone else and quickly made off with it, not even her mother could know! Now, safe and in the comfort of her cave, the young feragon could indulge. She could sit back and take her time, melting the solid statue bit by bit, her mouth already watering at the thought.
