class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go talk to Nyxa |NyxaMenu]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedHeal.png"></div>\ <</if>>\ <</if>>When you wake up the next morning, you feel... off. There's something strange about these dreams, a weight to them, as if they're not mere figments of imagination, but something more. <<if $quickSleep is false>> <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |Bedroom]]</div>\ <<else>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |PortalRoom]]</div>\ <</if>>\<div class="passCheck">\ You can't help but notice the beautiful flowers growing around you, vibrant and full of life. You pick up a bunch of them, if for no other reason than to keep a reminder of your time here. <img src="Images/Icons/Item.png"></div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Search the feet of the mountain for any cave or crevice |SearchFeet]]</div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Climb to the mountain peaks |SearchMountainPeaks]]</div>\<div class="passCheck">\ You can't help but notice the beautiful flowers growing around you, vibrant and full of life. You pick up a bunch of them, if for no other reason than to keep a reminder of your time here. <img src="Images/Icons/Item.png"></div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go find your prey |GoFindWolyrn]]</div>\A tighly-bunched bouquet of strange, blue, ghostly flowers. Worthless, but quite pretty. [[Go back |Inventory]]You hang the dreamcatcher on the wall, next to the bed. You doubt of its effectiveness, but to be fair, Vael's trinkets usually do their job. <div class="passCheck">\ -30% <img src="Images/Icons/FailNightmare.png"></div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |Bedroom][$dreamcatcher =2]]</div>\ You wake up, drenched in sweat and breathing heavily. The atmosphere around you is thick with an oppressive stillness, broken only by the sound of your own labored breathing... and you find yourself lying on a cold, obsidian floor. The smooth black stone stretches in every direction, forming a vast labyrinth of jagged, towering walls that seem to emit faint light, making it possible for you to see. Your mind is foggy, memories hazy and blurred. How did you get here? What is this place? <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Stand up and look around |StandLook]]</div>\You stand up and look around, but all you see are the walls, stretching in every direction, dissapearing as they bend and twist in harsh angles. @@.playerSpeech;"What the..."@@ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Call out for help |CallHelp]]</div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Walk in a random direction |WalkRandom]]</div>\You shout, trying to draw attention, to let others know you are there. Your voice simply echoes around the empty space, and no one answers. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Walk in a random direction |WalkRandom]]</div>\Not sure what else to do, for lack of a better plan, you just start walking, your footsteps echoing eerily through the maze. The ground beneath you feels unnervingly smooth, and despite the faint light, everything has an oppressive darkness to it. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue walking around aimlessly... |WalkRandom2]]</div>\ <<if $cumSkill >= 5>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Whip your cock out and jerk off |JerkOffNightmare]] <img src="Images/Icons/RedCum.png"></div>\ <<else>>\ @@.fadedLink;<div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Whip your cock out and jerk off |JerkOffNightmare]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedCum.png"></div>@@\ <</if>>\ You keep walking, not sure what to do, or even what you should be looking for. This all has to be a weird nightmare, and you should wake up at any moment. Why does it feel so... real, then? It's then that you feel something, a faint, but palpable sensation, something pulling you, drawing you in. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Follow the invisible pull |FollowPull]]</div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Sit down and take a moment |SitDownMoment]]</div>\You should be terrified, lost in a seemingly infinite maze with no way out, and yet, you can't help yourself but feeling horny, your balls always heavy, cock ready to burst. You whip your cock out and start jerking off, letting the tension release in the form of cum, which splatters on the dark floor. A voice then, an outraged hiss that reverberates through the air. You immediately wake up after that, and find yourself back in your room, surrounded by the familiar walls and furniture. <<if $quickSleep is false>> <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |Bedroom]]</div>\ <<else>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |PortalRoom]]</div>\ <</if>>\This is madness. This whole situation is madness. You sit down on the floor, trying to collect your thoughts, to calm down. It's not the first weird, extremely realistic nightmare you've had, all you have to do is to wait for it to pass, and in the meantime, avoid any strange situations that could trigger an even worse experience. Sure enough, your intuition seems to be right this time. After a few moments, you wake up and find yourself back in your room, surrounded by the familiar walls and furniture. <<if $quickSleep is false>> <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |Bedroom]]</div>\ <<else>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |PortalRoom]]</div>\ <</if>>\You move following the strange attraction until you reach a round chamber with a small pedestal at its center. In it rests a black cube made of the same material as the rest of the place, floating slightly above the surface. <div class="passCheck">\ Looks quite valuable, you are sure Vael would be interested in such a relic... if you can carry it with you. <img src="Images/Icons/Coins.png"></div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Take the cube |TakeCube]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedItem.png"></div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Do not take the cube |NotTakecube]]</div>\You figure the thing must be important, or the pull wouldn't lead you to it, and so you pick it up, eager to study it. However, as soon as your hands make contact with the dark material, an intense, searing cold shoots through your entire body. Your fingers freeze in place, unable to let go, as the black cube pulses in your grip. Suddenly, the air shifts. The faint light dims even further, and you feel a presence, though you can't see it. It's as if the walls themselves are breathing, closing in on you with an almost tangible malice. A whisper crawls through the stillness, but you can’t make out the words. It feels ancient, spiteful, and utterly malevolent. You feel a sharp pain in your hand, then arm and chest as it spreads towards your neck. Its as if a thousand needles were digging through your skin and into the flesh. You try to scream, but no sound comes out. <div class="linkIcons"> <img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png"><<link "Eternal, dreamless sleep...">> <<goto "Death">> <</link>>\ <img src="Images/Icons/RedSkull.png" >\ <img src="Images/Icons/RedEye.png" >\ </div>\Why wouldn't you take it? It's not like there is a good reason not to, after all. Seems like the main attraction of the area... and imagine how much money it would bring to your pocket... <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[On second thought... |TakeCube]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedItem.png"></div>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Do not take the cube |NotTakecube2]]</div>\... <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[You feel uneasy |UneasyNightmare][$eyeSeeing+=1]]</div>\You wake up, drenched in sweat and breathing heavily. You find yourself back in your room, surrounded by the familiar walls and furniture. The nightmare seems to be over. <<if $quickSleep is false>> <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |Bedroom]]</div>\ <<else>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |PortalRoom]]</div>\ <</if>>\<<if $azriActive is true>>\ The duty to the hunt is paramount, but so is the duty to rest and recover. Azri'Elis impending escape can probably wait another day. <</if>>\ You pass the time in your house, taking care of your equipment and belongings, or just lounging around and resting. <<set $dayOff to true>> <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue |PortalRoom]]<img src="Images/Icons/RedTime.png"></div>\You remember how Damlon used to train you, back when you were still a hunter in training, a boy. The old man was always strict and demanding, never letting up even when the exhaustion was so much you could barely stand, but you know that despite his cold and gruff exterior, he cares about the well-being of his apprentices. It has been long since you last sparred with the old man, but perhaps it would do you good to return to the basics, the proper techniques. So you tell him what's on your mind, how you would like him to help you train, to regain the edge. He slowly lifts his gaze from the pile of papers on his table, his blind eye staring at the empty air as he processes the request. @@.damlonSpeech;"Heh, we both are the same rank now, High Hunter. I'm not sure it is my place to teach you anymore"@@ @@.playerSpeech;"You've never stopped being my mentor, Damlon. Rank or not, I could still use your guidance. Besides, it's not about rank... it's about refining what I already know. I feel... rusty."@@ Damlon grunts, a low, familiar sound that speaks of both amusement and contemplation. He leans back in his chair, crossing his arms over his chest, his weathered face unreadable for a moment. @@.damlonSpeech;"Rusty, eh? Well, if you're asking me to put you through the grinder again, I won’t say no. But don’t think I’ll go easy on you just because you’ve climbed a few rungs on the ladder."@@ He smiles a bit, the wrinkles around his eyes and mouth crinkling. @@.damlonSpeech;"Let me get some things together, and I'll meet you out at the training ground in an hour. Make sure you're warmed up."@@ <<set $damlonTrain to true>> <<set $playerEnergy to "damlon">> <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Continue... |AskDamlonTrain2]]</div>\You do as instructed, heading to the training ground and stretching, preparing for what’s to come. The cold air sharpens your senses as you wait, and soon, Damlon arrives, no practice swords at all. You will be using the real thing... if you get wounded, Nyxa can always patch you up. @@.damlonSpeech;"Let us see if those instincts of yours have trully dulled..."@@ Soon enough, the clash of your blades echoes across the training grounds. <<if $hunterSkill < 10>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[A humbling lesson ensues... |LoseDamlon][$hunterSkill +=1]]<div class="numberStat">+1</div><img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"></div>\ @@.fadedLink;<div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[Perhaps it's your time to teach the old man new tricks? |Hunters Hall]]<div class="numberStat">10</div><img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"><img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"></div>@@\ <<else>>\ @@.fadedLink;<div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[A humbling lesson ensues... |Hunters Hall]]<div class="numberStat">+1</div><img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"></div>@@\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Perhaps it's your time to teach the old man new tricks? |DefeatDamlon]]<div class="numberStat">10</div><img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"><img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"></div>\ <</if>>\The lesson is a humbling one, as they always were. The man may be old, half blind, and slow, but his technique is still impeccable, and the sheer strength behind his strikes is impressive for a man his age. He seems to be able to counter every single one of your moves, if for no other reason, he was the one who taught half of them to you. Soon, you find yourself on the ground, the tip of the blade cold and unforgiving. @@.damlonSpeech;"Get up. Again."@@ <div class="passCheck">\ You get up, and the bout continues, for what feels like hours. By the time it's over, you are drenched in sweat, panting and sore. But you also feel refreshed, and confident in your abilities. <img src="Images/Icons/General.png"></div>\ <<if $fromPortal is false>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go back |Hunters Hall]]</div>\ <<else>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go back |PortalRoom]]</div>\ <</if>>\He may have been your mentor, long ago, but the truth is that you have outgrown him. There is a reason Lauren put him to deal with paperwork instead of in the front lines, and while his technique is not lacking, he is too rigid, too predictable. So, you decide to give him a demonstration, let him feel a taste of his own medicine by aggressively countering his blows and showing him the results of your training, of your martial superiority. <div class="passCheck">\ Soon, you have him disarmed, and on his back. You stand above him, sword at his neck, and you can see the surprise, the confusion in his expression. <img src="Images/Icons/General.png"><img src="Images/Icons/General.png"></div>\ @@.damlonSpeech;"So, this was just an excuse to embarrass me, eh? You really are a High Hunter, aren't you?"@@ But you can also see the pride, the realization that he has done his duty as a teacher, that you have far surpassed his abilities. You help him to his feet, and he claps you on the shoulder, grinning. @@.damlonSpeech;"You have learned well. But don't let it get to your head. The foes you will face out there won't fight fair. Martial superiority won't win you every battle."@@ You nod, and Damlon picks up his sword, his movements a bit stiff. @@.damlonSpeech;"Gah, I miss this. Shuffling papers is no substitute for a good hunt. I know I will never be on Orion's or Vael's level, but I pray Lauren will deem me worthy enough of immortality. A curse I'm willing to bear for the Order."@@ <<if $fromPortal is false>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go back |Hunters Hall]]</div>\ <<else>>\ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Go back |PortalRoom]]</div>\ <</if>>\When the images finally coalesce into something meaningful, you find yourself bound and restrained on a wall, your arms and legs covered by some hardened sticky goo that keeps you locked in place. In front of you, a massive, insect-like creature stares at you, her sightless gaze firmly locked onto yours. Her features are not human, or at least not entirely, a blend of woman and arachnid that somehow makes her look more beautiful, exotic, than grotesque. She is certainly grotesque as well, and the position you find yourself in does not help, as she is almost twice your size, her massive abdomen rising behind her. <img src="Images/Monsters/Queen.png" class="resizable-image" alt="Dream Image"> @@.insectSpeech;"Such a fine... fine specimen, so healthy and full of vigor, so ripe and juicy~"@@ Her mandibles click and clack as she talks, and she leans closer, her face plate coming to hover mere inches from yours. <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Try to break free |BreakFreeInsect]]<div class="numberStat">3</div><img src="Images/Icons/RedGeneral.png"></div> <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[Just stay there and see what happens |RemainStillInsect]]</div><<if $hunterSkill <= 3>>\ You are not just going to stay there and allow her to do whatever she wants, you need to break free, to try and escape. <div class="failCheck">\ You struggle, but the hard substance is stronger than you are, and all you achieve is to burn through your energy, tire yourself even more. I still need, require to taste the sweet, delicious nectar from your flower, the life-giving juice of your body~"@@ @@.playerSpeech;"Wha... what?"@@ The large, insectile creature simply chuckles as she lowers herself to your groin, her mouth parting slightly. You then feel her breath on your flaccid cock as she inhales deeply, taking in the scent of your genitals. @@.insectSpeech;"I can already tell, your sperm will be rich and potent, the perfect, perfect fertilizer~"@@ <div class="linkIcons"><img src="Images/Icons/RedArrow.png">[[You are about to get sexually assaulted by an insect... |SexInsect]]</div> <<else>>\ You are not just going to stay there and allow her to do whatever she wants, you need to break free, to try and escape.
